title: Kesha`s Movement
description: The "Kesha`s Movement" mod provides greater control over movement.
body:
This mod simplifies movement and gives you more control while walking.

Imagine a situation: you’re moving forward by holding down the W key, but then you press and hold S.

In the vanilla game, you’d simply stop—but this mod fixes that issue, allowing you to move backward as intended.

Now regarding control: in the vanilla game, while moving—say, left and right—you’d move fairly smoothly, but not continuously. With the mod, this changes, and you get nearly seamless, uninterrupted movement almost all the time!
